rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks within component type or implementation annexes
Assumptions referring to component ports must be placed in valid component type scopes
generic_rules: AGREE expressions must match the actual data types of referenced identifiers
Boolean range comparisons should only be used when the port is explicitly typed as AGREE bool
AADL property names like Compute_Execution_Time or unit tokens are not automatically available in AGREE scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq variable : type = expression` for typed boolean range declarations
Place implementation-level bindings in component implementation annexes
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL timing properties or unit tokens as AGREE variables
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons
